title: Goals-Beta Widget Not Filtering!
excerpt:
Anyone else really want to use the Goals-Beta widget in the CRM, but the filters that would make it useful don’t work? 
The widget is basically useless due to it adding all of the values from a board instead of ones spec…

posts.author: JCVC (James Clancy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Anyone else really want to use the Goals-Beta widget in the CRM, but the filters that would make it useful don’t work?

The widget is basically useless due to it adding all of the values from a board instead of ones specified in the filter. (Green number below should be 0 based on the filters)

image1853×838 72.4 KB

I have seen multiple community posts about this issue and figured it would be resolved seeing that they are a couple of years old. However, I spoke with a friendly support rep and she mentioned that filters still do not work on the widget. Is anyone else experiencing this issue?

posts.author: pawlowski6132 (Joe Pawlowski)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes!! How do I vote for this?

posts.author: jpelrman87 (Josh Perlman)
posts.cookedHtml:
8mo later and a fairly core CRM functionality is still broken and no response. They also do not have a proper funnel view.

Yet they charge the same as other CRMs that have that functionality. Glad they have added 500+ headcount yet still are not actually updating or fixing features in any kind of reasonable time frame

posts.author: AJarrett (a.jarrett@midan.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Still not working from what I can see. Thought I was crazy until I found this post.
Please fix!

posts.author: josbri (Josh)
posts.cookedHtml:
I thought I was going crazy when my CFO and I were trying to get this to work and it just doesn’t. Glad I’m not the only one.

Hoping Monday.com reps can shed some light on timeframe to fix.

posts.author: screendoor44 (Brett)
posts.cookedHtml: Pathetic. February of 2025 and this is still not working. This isn’t a feature request – it’s a bug fix requirement. The Goals widget is virtually useless without the ability to apply filters. Very frustrating. C’mon, Monday, I was hoping you were better than this.

posts.author: jamesdornan (James)
posts.cookedHtml: Yeah this is very frustrating. I spent a lot of time trying to get it to work before finding this. Please fix this bug Monday

posts.author: ACD (Alexandre Derycz)
posts.cookedHtml: Just ran into this glaring issue today… hard to believe this feature was implemented without filters working properly…. how long can a feature be in beta for exactly?!
